title: Finite Hyperplane Separation Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite separation bad convex-combination point and bad separator QF_LRA/Farkas regression seeds
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact convex-combination replay computes point (1/3,1/3) while one malformed row claims x=1/2; exact separator replay computes outside_score = 4 for point (2,2) under x + y while another malformed row claims outside_score <= 1.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional finite separation rows only when they add distinct support, duality, face, or certificate pressure beyond the current convex-combination and separator rows; keep general separation, Hahn-Banach, SDP duality, and algorithm convergence in horizon lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode finite convex-hull and separator witnesses as deterministic exact-rational replay rows.
Replay convex weights, dot products, margins, and tight faces over exact rationals.
Route false finite convex-combination and separator claims through checked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence after replay computes the offending value.
Keep general separation theorems, Hahn-Banach-style arguments, SDP duality, and convergence claims marked Lean-horizon until proof artifacts exist.
